name: CST Group Limited
summary: CST Group Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the exploration, development, mining, processing, and sale of coal in Canada. It operates through five segments: Mining Business, Investment in Financial Instruments, Property Investment, and Money Lending. The company is involved in the securities and property investment, money lending, and aircraft and vessel holding businesses; and provision of secretarial services. It operates in the People's Republic of China, Hong Kong, Canada, the United Kingdom, Singapore, and internationally. The company was formerly known as NetMind Financial Holdings Limited and changed its name to CST Group Limited in September 2017. CST Group Limited was founded in 1993 and is headquartered in Wanchai, Hong Kong.
